Photos, room count, ceiling height, color changes, and surface condition help us price the work
Furniture, wall hangings, outlet covers, access, pets, and occupied-home timing should be planned before the crew arrives
Water damage, active leaks, mold, smoke damage, or lead-paint concerns may need remediation or a specialty contractor before painting
Cabinet, trim, and door refinishing depends on existing coating, sanding needs, workspace, dry time, and desired finish level
Exterior painting, high-access work, specialty coatings, or major substrate repairs may need separate review before we commit
